title: V1.1 Architecture Alignment Blockers (TD-1~TD-6)

metadata.description: Resolve 6 Critical+High tech debt items from architecture alignment review: TD-1 (sync wiring), TD-2 (WorldStatus enum), TD-3 (MembershipStatus enum), TD-4 (JSON Schema enum typing), TD-5 (canonical_hash), TD-6 (User aggregate).
